title: C-DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
org: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Pune
shortInfo: C-DAC Pune is recruiting Consultants on contractual basis for various specialized domains.

basic_details.job_title: C-DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026 - Apply Online
basic_details.organization_name: Centre for Development of Advanced Computing (C-DAC), Pune
basic_details.post_name: Consultant (Part Time / Full Time) – Data Center Operations, Domain Expert – Police, Module Lead
basic_details.short_information: C-DAC Pune is recruiting Consultants on contractual basis for various specialized domains.

vacancy_details.Position / Designation: Data Center Operations – Consultant (Part Time / Full Time)
Domain Expert – Police – Consultant (Part Time / Full Time)
Module Lead – Consultant (Part Time / Full Time)

selection_process: Selection will be based on Interview / Assessment. Shortlisted candidates will be informed through email. Final selection is subject to verification of documents and eligibility.
how_to_apply: Candidates must apply online through the official C-DAC Careers portal https://careers.cdac.in. No offline or email applications will be accepted.
important_instructions: Read General Terms & Conditions carefully before applying. Keep valid email ID and mobile number active throughout the process. Only online applications will be considered. Incomplete or wrongly filled applications will be rejected. Canvassing in any form will lead to disqualification. C-DAC reserves the right to cancel or modify the recruitment process at any stage.

faq.question: Q1. What is C‑DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: C‑DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026 is a contractual engagement drive for experienced professionals in specialized domains like Data Center Operations, Police domain and IT modules. The recruitment is being conducted through Advertisement No. Pune/Consultant/01/2026 for a total of 7 Consultant posts on part‑time or full‑time basis.

faq.question: Q2. How many vacancies are there in C‑DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: A total of 07 Consultant vacancies have been notified under C‑DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026. These include 4 posts for Data Center Operations Consultant, 2 posts for Domain Expert – Police and 1 post for Module Lead on a purely temporary, project‑based contract.

faq.question: Q3. What are the important dates for C‑DAC Pune Consultant 2026?
faq.answer: The online application process for C‑DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026 started on 16 May 2026. The last date to submit the online application form is 30 May 2026 up to 18:00 hours, and interview/assessment dates will be informed later to shortlisted candidates via email.

faq.question: Q4. Which posts are available and where is the place of posting?
faq.answer: The notification includes three categories of Consultant posts – Data Center Operations, Domain Expert – Police and Module Lead. Data Center Operations Consultants (4 posts) will be posted at Bangalore and Delhi, while Domain Expert – Police (2 posts) and Module Lead (1 post) will be based in Delhi.

faq.question: Q5. What is the age limit for C‑DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: For Consultant – Data Center Operations posts, the maximum age limit is 50 years as on the cut‑off date mentioned in the advertisement. For Consultant – Module Lead and Domain Expert – Police posts, the upper age limit is 64 years, making it suitable for senior professionals and retirees with relevant domain expertise.

faq.question: Q6. What is the eligibility criteria for C‑DAC Pune Consultant posts?
faq.answer: Only Indian citizens with prescribed educational qualifications and substantial post‑qualification experience in the relevant domain are eligible. Candidates must possess the required degree/technical background and domain‑specific experience, and only experience acquired after the qualifying degree will be counted towards eligibility.

faq.question: Q7. What is the selection process for C‑DAC Pune Consultant Recruitment 2026?
faq.answer: Selection will be done through Interview/Assessment conducted by C‑DAC. Shortlisted candidates will be informed about the schedule and mode of assessment through email, and final selection will be subject to verification of original documents and fulfillment of all eligibility criteria.
